title: Wall Panels
shortDescription: Upgrade your interiors with premium wall panels in India. A+ grade PVC & WPC, extra-wide 12-inch PVC Panels, and India’s first fabric-texture PVC & Fluted Panels. Fast 2-hour delivery in Gurgaon & Delhi NCR.
longDescription: Redefine your interiors with premium wall panels in India by Goals Floors. Designed for architects, interior designers, and modern homeowners, our panels combine luxury aesthetics with long-lasting durability. Choose from architectural-grade WPC wall panels that offer a natural 3D wood look with waterproof and termite-proof performance, or upgrade to A+ grade PVC wall panels available in extra-wide 12-inch designs for a seamless and elegant finish. We also introduce India’s first fabric texture wall panels, bringing a soft, sophisticated feel with enhanced acoustic comfort. Ideal for both residential and commercial spaces, our panels ensure low maintenance and high performance. Get fast 2-hour delivery in Gurgaon & Delhi NCR, along with reliable Pan-India supply for projects of any scale.

features.title: Architectural Grade Durability
features.description: Engineered with high-density WPC and premium PVC materials, our wall panels deliver superior impact resistance and structural integrity for any luxury setting.

features.title: Ultimate Moisture Resilience
features.description: Designed for uncompromising performance, these waterproof wall panels ensure zero moisture absorption, maintaining flawless walls in any climate across India.

features.title: 12-Inch Seamless Breadth
features.description: Our A+ grade PVC wall panels feature an exclusive 12-inch width, minimizing joints and creating a continuous, expansive aesthetic for high-end interiors.

features.title: India's First Fabric Texture
features.description: Pioneering tactile luxury, our exclusive fabric texture finish—available in both PVC and fluted formats—brings the sophistication of fine textiles to solid cladding.

features.title: Precision Interlocking System
features.description: Crafted with a state-of-the-art tongue-and-groove mechanism, ensuring a flawless, joint-free installation for a continuous architectural aesthetic.

features.title: Pre-Finished Elegance
features.description: Arriving with premium scratch-resistant surface films, these wall panels require zero painting or polishing, delivering instant sophistication.

applications: Statement Wall Panels for Living Room & Lounge Spaces
Acoustic-Enhancing Wall Panels for TV Unit & Media Backdrops
Sophisticated Wall Panels for Office Receptions & Corporate Lobbies
Luxury Master Bedroom Paneling & Headboard Accents
Premium Retail Boutiques & Commercial Showroom Cladding
installation: Engineered for precision and speed. Our wall panels feature an intuitive interlocking mechanism that seamlessly mounts onto leveled walls or structural grids using heavy-duty PU adhesive and concealed brad nails. The result is a flawless, hardware-free architectural finish, ready in a fraction of the time of traditional cladding.
maintenance: Designed for effortless longevity. The premium surface films naturally repel dust and stains. Routine upkeep requires only a swift sweep with a dry microfiber cloth or a soft vacuum brush, preserving the pristine aesthetic of your wall panels with minimal effort.

faqs.question: Which wall panel is best in India for luxury interiors?
faqs.answer: The ideal choice depends on your design goals. Our architectural-grade WPC wall panels are perfect for solid, 3D luxury textures, while our 12-inch A+ grade PVC wall panels offer a seamless, grand aesthetic. Both are considered among the finest premium wall panels in India.

faqs.question: What is the difference between WPC and PVC wall panels?
faqs.answer: WPC wall panels (Wood Plastic Composite) are highly robust, solid panels offering deep, fluted wood-like textures. PVC wall panels are lighter, ultra-versatile, and feature premium surface films. Our exclusive A+ grade PVC wall panels are engineered 12 inches wide for a seamless, refined look.

faqs.question: What is the delivery time for wall panels in Gurgaon and Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: We value your time. Goals Floors offers an exclusive, lightning-fast 2-hour delivery service for wall panels in Gurgaon and the wider Delhi NCR region. We also provide a reliable Pan-India supply for projects nationwide.

faqs.question: Are these wall panels suitable for living rooms and TV units?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Installing wall panels for living room accent walls or using fluted wall panels for TV unit backdrops creates a stunning, modern focal point while elegantly concealing wires and structural imperfections.

faqs.question: What makes your fabric texture wall panels unique?
faqs.answer: We are proud to introduce India’s first fabric texture panels, available in both WPC fluted and PVC formats. This cutting-edge innovation combines the soft, premium feel of bespoke upholstery with the durability of solid wall panels.

faqs.question: Are these wall panels waterproof and termite-proof?
faqs.answer: Yes. Both our WPC and PVC wall panels are engineered to be 100% moisture-proof and completely immune to termites and borers, ensuring lifetime structural integrity for your interiors.

faqs.question: Can these wall panels be used in commercial office spaces?
faqs.answer: Certainly. Using premium wall panels for office lobbies, conference rooms, and executive suites elevates the corporate aesthetic. Their rapid installation minimizes downtime for commercial renovations.

faqs.question: Do I need to paint or polish these wall panels after installation?
faqs.answer: No painting or polishing is required. Our wall panels come pre-finished with high-end, scratch-resistant surface films, delivering a flawless, ready-to-use architectural finish straight out of the box.

faqs.question: How do you ensure a seamless look during installation?
faqs.answer: Our panels utilize a precision tongue-and-groove interlocking system. When installing our extra-wide 12-inch PVC panels or WPC panels, the joints and fixing hardware are completely concealed, resulting in a continuous, high-end surface.

faqs.question: Do you supply wall panels outside of Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Yes, while we offer 2-hour expedited delivery for wall panels in Gurgaon and Delhi NCR, we are a leading Pan-India supplier. We securely ship our premium wall panel collections to architectural projects and homes across the entire country.

installationSteps.title: Prepare the Canvas
installationSteps.description: Ensure the wall surface is optimally primed:
points: The plane must be structurally flat, immaculate, and free of debris.
Verify absolute dryness to maximize the high-performance adhesive bond.
installationSteps.tip: For compromised or uneven surfaces, we recommend mounting onto a precision plywood grid or leveling the plaster prior to application.

installationSteps.title: Measure & Calibrate
points: Execute precise measurements of the vertical space and cut the panels using a fine-toothed architectural saw.
Ensure all cuts maintain a strict 90-degree tolerance for an imperceptible fit.

installationSteps.title: Apply High-Performance Adhesive
installationSteps.description: Deploy premium-grade PU adhesive for maximum structural integrity:
points: Distribute the adhesive in a continuous zig-zag matrix across the panel's reverse side.
Maintain a 1-inch perimeter from all edges to prevent extrusion during mounting.

installationSteps.title: Engage & Conceal
points: Slide the tongue seamlessly into the groove of the preceding panel.
Apply firm, even pressure against the wall to activate the adhesive bond.
Fasten the concealed lip using brad nails to lock the architectural finish securely in place.
